mnemonics: F.R.E.S.H. V.I.S.I.O.N. - Focus Resources Efficiently, Study Hard. Videos, Images, Slides, Insights, Online Notes.
keyPoints: Prioritize official course materials like lecture slides and notes.
Supplement learning with recommended academic papers and textbooks.
Utilize practical resources like code repositories and video tutorials.
commonMistakes: Overwhelming yourself with too many resources instead of mastering a few.
Using outdated tutorials or code examples that are no longer relevant.
Skipping the foundational theory and jumping straight to code implementation.
